name: Sarah Connor
summary: Senior ML Engineer with 8+ years experience. Expert in LLMs, RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, and scalable vector search databases.

work_experience.description: Led deployment of RAG pipeline processing 10M queries/day using Milvus vector database and LLM fine-tuning via QLoRA. Built microservices in Python.
Built and trained deep neural networks using PyTorch for NLP tasks. Implemented model optimization and model deployment with Docker and Kubernetes.

name: John Connor
summary: ML Engineer specialized in PyTorch modeling. Expanding skills in LLMs and MLOps.

work_experience.description: Trained and evaluated deep learning architectures in PyTorch. Worked on model optimization and basic Python backend systems.

name: Marcus Wright
summary: Software Developer interested in transitioning to AI/ML.

work_experience.description: Developed web applications in JavaScript and Python. Maintained SQL databases.

name: Honeypot Chronos
summary: Senior ML Engineer working two full-time roles simultaneously.

work_experience.description: Deep neural network training and LoRA fine-tuning.
Milvus vector database deployment and RAG pipeline engineering.

name: Honeypot Overflow
summary: Junior engineer claiming decades of experience across skills.
